prediction.reasoning: Based on historical IBM volatility (~20% annualized) and 20-day forecast horizon. IBM typically exhibits moderate volatility with slight upward drift. Used geometric Brownian motion assumptions with daily volatility of ~1.3%. Point estimate assumes slight positive momentum. Confidence intervals reflect increasing uncertainty over 20-day period with symmetric distribution around expected value.
